name: Apple Fritters/Deep Fried
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Apples (unpeeled, finely diced or grated)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill
Unpeeled apple, finely diced or grated.
In a mixing bowl, combine beaten egg, milk, apples, sugar, salt, orange peel, orange juice, and vanilla. Sift together the flour and baking powder; fold into the apple mixture, stirring just until all flour is moistened. Drop batter by rounded teaspoon into hot oil (350°F). Fry until deep golden brown, about 3-4 minutes, turning once. Drain fritters thoroughly on paper towels. Roll in sugar or sift the sugar over the tops. Yield: about 40 fritters.
Recipe from The Best of County Cooking
